TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Takidis, title = Takidis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Takidis} }

S.FORM: alang Takidis ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 157 buwan, 371 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 57% kyan ku 212 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 43% kyan ku 159 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Takidis hya' ga Tjavualji. tay mkyahu' na Takidis hya' ga Sasaljak. tay mkyahu' na eki' hya' ga Takidis. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Takidis ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Takidis ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Takidis ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Takidis ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 157 buwan, 371 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 57% kyan ku 212 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 43% kyan ku 159 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Takidis hya' ga Tjavualji. tay mkyahu' na Takidis hya' ga Sasaljak. tay mkyahu' na eki' hya' ga Takidis. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Takidis ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Takidis ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Takidis ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taki*is~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na taki*is~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa tja*ualji. taj mkjaħuʔ na taki*is~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕas~ɕaljak. taj mkjaħuʔ na ekiʔ ħjaʔ ɣa taki*is~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ taki*is~ɕ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ taki*is~ɕ ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ taki*is~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
